    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    S

    saveButton - Variable in class ui.ExpenseLoggingScreen
    Button that submits the expense.
    savePin(String) - Method in class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    Persists a hashed PIN, replacing any previously stored value.
    securityBtn - Variable in class ui.SettingsScreen
    Sub-nav button for the Security panel.
    selectedCategory - Variable in class ui.ExpenseLoggingScreen
    Currently selected category, kept in sync with the combo box.
    sendNotification(String) - Method in class control.AlertManager
    Sends a notification message.
    setActiveSubNav(JButton) - Method in class ui.SettingsScreen
    Highlights the active sub-nav button and resets the others.
    setAmount(double) - Method in class domain.Expense
    Updates the monetary amount of this expense.
    setCategoryId(int) - Method in class domain.Expense
    Updates the category associated with this expense.
    setId(int) - Method in class domain.BudgetCycle
    Sets the database ID (called after DB insert).
    setId(int) - Method in class domain.Expense
    Sets the database ID for this expense (called after DB insert).
    setName(String) - Method in class domain.Category
    Updates the display name of this category.
    setPIN(String) - Method in class control.AuthManager
    Hashes and persists a new PIN, replacing any previously stored one.
    setStatus(CycleStatus) - Method in class domain.BudgetCycle
    Updates the lifecycle status of this cycle.
    SettingsScreen - Class in ui
    Settings screen with three sub-sections: Categories, Security, and Cycle.
    SettingsScreen(App) - Constructor for class ui.SettingsScreen
    Constructs the SettingsScreen.
    setTotalSpent(double) - Method in class domain.BudgetCycle
    Updates the cached total spent amount.
    SetupScreen - Class in ui
    First-run screen where the user defines their budget cycle.
    SetupScreen(App) - Constructor for class ui.SetupScreen
    Constructs the SetupScreen.
    showBudgetWarning(String) - Method in class ui.DashboardScreen
    Shows a warning dialog with a budget alert message.
    showDashboardScreen() - Method in class app.App
    Replaces the frame content with the DashboardScreen.
    showEmptyState() - Method in class ui.HistoryScreen
    Shows an information dialog prompting the user to select a row first.
    showError(String) - Method in class ui.ExpenseLoggingScreen
    Shows a validation error message below the form.
    showError(String) - Method in class ui.SetupScreen
    Displays a validation error message below the form.
    showExpenseLoggingScreen() - Method in class app.App
    Replaces the frame content with the ExpenseLoggingScreen.
    showHistoryScreen() - Method in class app.App
    Replaces the frame content with the HistoryScreen.
    showLockoutMessage(int) - Method in class ui.LockScreen
    Displays the lockout message with the remaining wait time.
    showLockScreen() - Method in class app.App
    Replaces the frame content with the LockScreen.
    showSettingsScreen() - Method in class app.App
    Replaces the frame content with the SettingsScreen.
    showSetupScreen() - Method in class app.App
    Replaces the frame content with the SetupScreen.
    showSuccessAndReturn() - Method in class ui.ExpenseLoggingScreen
    Navigates back to the dashboard after a successful save.
    showWrongPinError() - Method in class ui.LockScreen
    Displays the incorrect PIN error message.
    spendingPieChart - Variable in class ui.DashboardScreen
    Pie chart showing spending broken down by category.
    spentPercentage - Variable in class ui.DashboardScreen
    Percentage of allowance spent (0.0–1.0), used to initialise the gauge.
    startCycleButton - Variable in class ui.SetupScreen
    Button that submits the form and creates the cycle.
    startDate - Variable in class domain.BudgetCycle
    First day of the budget cycle (inclusive).
    startDay - Variable in class ui.SetupScreen
    Day spinner for the cycle start date.
    startMonth - Variable in class ui.SetupScreen
    Month spinner for the cycle start date.
    startYear - Variable in class ui.SetupScreen
    Year spinner for the cycle start date.
    status - Variable in class domain.BudgetCycle
    Current lifecycle status of this cycle.
    styleTransactionTable(JTable) - Method in class ui.HistoryScreen
    Applies dark-themed cell renderers and styling to the transaction table, then wraps it in a scroll pane.
    subTitleFontSize - Variable in class ui.DashboardScreen
    Font size for the screen subtitle label.
    subTitleFontSize - Variable in class ui.HistoryScreen
    Font size for the screen subtitle label.
    subTitleFontSize - Variable in class ui.SetupScreen
    Font size for the screen subtitle label.
    subTitleLabel - Variable in class ui.HistoryScreen
    Subtitle showing the current month and year.
